ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "postseason" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game is a postseason game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcasted the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., NO, NYG) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., NFC, AFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., East, West) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., natural grass, artificial turf) */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., open, retractable, closed) */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last major renovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game (1, 2, 3, 4, OT) */,
  "clock" TEXT /* Time remaining on the clock (e.g., 15:00, 02:34) */,
  "possession_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team in possession */,
  "down" TEXT /* Down of the play (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th) */,
  "ball_placement" TEXT /* Yard line where the ball is placed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play */,
  "play_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play type */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained during the play */,
  "yards_lost" INTEGER /* Total yards lost during the play */,
  "play_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_possession_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("possession_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_type_id") REFERENCES play_types ("play_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_result_id") REFERENCES play_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play participant */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the participant is involved in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the play (e.g., quarterback, runner, receiver) */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained by the player */,
  "yards_lost" INTEGER /* Yards lost by the player */,
  "yards_returned" INTEGER /* Yards returned by the player */,
  "play_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play type the participant was involved in */,
  "play_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play result the participant was involved in */,
  "penalties_committed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the player during the play */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total penalty yards committed by the player during the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_participants_play_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_type_id") REFERENCES play_types ("play_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_participants_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_participants_play_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_result_id") REFERENCES play_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_types" (
  "play_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play type */,
  "play_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the play type (e.g., pass, run, kick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play type */,
  "is_scoring_play" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the play can score points */,
  "average_yards" REAL /* Average yards gained or lost for this type of play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play result */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the result belongs to */,
  "play_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play type */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the play result (e.g., touchdown, incomplete pass, sack) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored as a result of the play */,
  "penalties_committed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed during the play */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total penalty yards committed during the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_results_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_results_play_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_type_id") REFERENCES play_types ("play_type_id")
)
